discrepancies.detail: Status "Orders In Progress" / order status "In Transit" implies a real order, but no order number is set. If this company has completed/in-progress orders, add the order number(s).
Row "Journee’s Racing (H99)" is tagged "Meta Ad Conversions" (queued to archive) but carries order number 92. Confirm it's really junk before archiving.

Owner-flagged: Happy Leaf (Status "Room Temp (Opportunities)") has at least one COMPLETED order, but the Notion export carries no order number for it. Add the order number(s) so the historical order(s) load and finances link.
